blended.narrative: Mont-Sainte-Anne is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 25 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,873 ft. Looking ahead, 47 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 14" of heavy snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Thursday: 16" of heavy snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 5" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
